programs.title: Wedding Anniversary
programs.desc: Kahani plans a getaway in Goa to celebrate her marriage anniversary with her husband. But he gets caught up in work and she is left alone on the special day. Her night, however, takes a drastic turn when a mysterious guest arrives to accompany her.
